commits: b8088a78: feat(627): add commit log collection for daily report generation
summary: Issue #627 TDD implementation complete. Added CommitLogEntry/RepositoryCommitLogs types, withTimeout utility, getCommitsByDateRange/collectRepositoryCommitLogs functions, extended sanitizeMessage with ESCAPED_TAGS loop, extended buildSummaryPrompt with commit_log section, and integrated commit log collection into daily-summary-generator. All 322 test files pass (6131 tests), 0 TypeScript errors, 0 ESLint errors.
